# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type PluginModule = {
  default?: unknown;
  name?: string;
  description?: string;
  version?: string;
  init?: (ctx: PluginContext) => unknown | Promise<unknown>;
  handle?: (req: Request, ctx: PluginContext) => Response | Promise<Response>;
  onRequest?: (req: Request, ctx: PluginContext) => Response | Promise<Response>;
};

type PluginContext = {
  requestId: string;
  url: URL;
  env: Record<string, string | undefined>;
  state: Map<string, unknown>;
  log: (...args: unknown[]) => void;
  plugins: LoadedPlugin[];
};

type LoadedPlugin = {
  specifier: string;
  ok: boolean;
  error?: string;
  module?: PluginModule;
  meta?: {
    name?: string;
    version?: string;
    description?: string;
    hasHandle?: boolean;
    hasInit?: boolean;
  };
};

const ENV_KEYS = ["PLUGIN_MODULES", "PLUGINS", "MODULES", "PLUGIN_PATHS"] as const;
const MAX_PLUGINS = 20;

function getEnvRecord(): Record<string, string | undefined> {
  const out: Record<string, string | undefined> = {};
  for (const k of ENV_KEYS) out[k] = Deno.env.get(k);
  out["ALLOW_DYNAMIC_PLUGINS"] = Deno.env.get("ALLOW_DYNAMIC_PLUGINS");
  out["PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST"] = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST");
  out["PLUGIN_BASE_URL"] = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_BASE_URL");
  return out;
}

function parseList(v: string | null | undefined): string[] {
  if (!v) return [];
  const trimmed = v.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return [];
  try {
    if (trimmed.startsWith("[") && trimmed.endsWith("]")) {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(trimmed);
      if (Array.isArray(parsed)) return parsed.map(String).map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    }
  } catch {
    // ignore
  }
  return trimmed
    .split(/[,\n;]/g)
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function uniqueKeepOrder(arr: string[]): string[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const out: string[] = [];
  for (const s of arr) {
    if (!seen.has(s)) {
      seen.add(s);
      out.push(s);
    }
  }
  return out;
}

function toBool(v: string | null | undefined, d = false): boolean {
  if (v == null) return d;
  const s = v.trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(s)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "no", "n", "off"].includes(s)) return false;
  return d;
}

function normalizeSpecifier(spec: string, baseUrl?: string): string {
  const s = spec.trim();
  if (!s) return s;

  if (s.startsWith("http://") || s.startsWith("https://") || s.startsWith("data:")) return s;

  if (baseUrl && (s.startsWith("./") || s.startsWith("../") || s.startsWith("/"))) {
    try {
      return new URL(s, baseUrl).toString();
    } catch {
      return s;
    }
  }

  return s;
}

function getAllowlist(): string[] {
  const allow = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST") ?? "";
  return parseList(allow);
}

function isAllowed(specifier: string, allowlist: string[]): boolean {
  if (allowlist.length === 0) return true;
  for (const rule of allowlist) {
    const r = rule.trim();
    if (!r) continue;
    if (r === "*") return true;
    if (r.endsWith("*")) {
      const prefix = r.slice(0, -1);
      if (specifier.startsWith(prefix)) return true;
      continue;
    }
    if (specifier === r) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

async function loadPlugins(specifiers: string[], ctx: PluginContext): Promise<LoadedPlugin[]> {
  const baseUrl = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_BASE_URL") || undefined;
  const allowlist = getAllowlist();

  const normalized = specifiers
    .map((s) => normalizeSpecifier(s, baseUrl))
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, MAX_PLUGINS);

  const results: LoadedPlugin[] = [];
  for (const specifier of normalized) {
    if (!isAllowed(specifier, allowlist)) {
      results.push({
        specifier,
        ok: false,
        error: "blocked_by_allowlist",
      });
      continue;
    }

    try {
      const mod = (await import(specifier)) as PluginModule;
      const meta = {
        name: typeof mod.name === "string" ? mod.name : undefined,
        version: typeof mod.version === "string" ? mod.version : undefined,
        description: typeof mod.description === "string" ? mod.description : undefined,
        hasHandle: typeof mod.handle === "function" || typeof mod.onRequest === "function",
        hasInit: typeof mod.init === "function",
      };
      const loaded: LoadedPlugin = { specifier, ok: true, module: mod, meta };

      if (typeof mod.init === "function") {
        try {
          await mod.init(ctx);
        } catch (e) {
          loaded.ok = false;
          loaded.error = `init_failed: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`;
        }
      }

      results.push(loaded);
    } catch (e) {
      results.push({
        specifier,
        ok: false,
        error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
      });
    }
  }

  return results;
}

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", "no-store");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), { ...init, headers });
}

function text(data: string, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", "no-store");
  return new Response(data, { ...init, headers });
}

function getRequestId(req: Request): string {
  const id =
    req.headers.get("x-request-id") ??
    req.headers.get("cf-ray") ??
    req.headers.get("x-vercel-id") ??
    crypto.randomUUID();
  return id;
}

function collectConfiguredModules(url: URL): { modules: string[]; source: Record<string, unknown> } {
  const envModules: string[] = [];
  for (const k of ENV_KEYS) envModules.push(...parseList(Deno.env.get(k)));

  const qpModules = parseList(url.searchParams.get("modules"));
  const qpPlugin = url.searchParams.get("module");
  if (qpPlugin) qpModules.push(qpPlugin);

  const allowDynamic = toBool(Deno.env.get("ALLOW_DYNAMIC_PLUGINS"), true);
  const modules = uniqueKeepOrder([
    ...envModules,
    ...(allowDynamic ? qpModules : []),
  ]);

  return {
    modules,
    source: {
      envKeys: ENV_KEYS,
      envCount: envModules.length,
      queryCount: allowDynamic ? qpModules.length : 0,
      allowDynamic,
      maxPlugins: MAX_PLUGINS,
    },
  };
}

async function dispatchToPlugins(req: Request, ctx: PluginContext): Promise<Response | null> {
  for (const p of ctx.plugins) {
    if (!p.ok || !p.module) continue;
    const mod = p.module;
    const handler = (typeof mod.onRequest === "function" ? mod.onRequest : undefined) ??
      (typeof mod.handle === "function" ? mod.handle : undefined);
    if (!handler) continue;

    try {
      const res = await handler(req, ctx);
      if (res instanceof Response) return res;
    } catch (e) {
      return json(
        {
          error: "plugin_handler_error",
          plugin: p.specifier,
          message: e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e),
          requestId: ctx.requestId,
        },
        { status: 500 },
      );
    }
  }
  return null;
}

serve(async (req: Request) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const requestId = getRequestId(req);

  const env = getEnvRecord();
  const state = new Map<string, unknown>();

  const configured = collectConfiguredModules(url);

  const ctx: PluginContext = {
    requestId,
    url,
    env,
    state,
    log: (...args: unknown[]) => console.log(`[${requestId}]`, ...args),
    plugins: [],
  };

  const plugins = await loadPlugins(configured.modules, ctx);
  ctx.plugins = plugins;

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return json({ ok: true, requestId });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/plugins") {
    return json({
      requestId,
      configured: configured.source,
      modules: configured.modules,
      loaded: plugins,
    });
  }

  const pluginRes = await dispatchToPlugins(req, ctx);
  if (pluginRes) return pluginRes;

  const accept = req.headers.get("accept") || "";
  if (accept.includes("text/html")) {
    const lines: string[] = [];
    lines.push("Deno Deploy Dynamic Plugin Loader");
    lines.push("");
    lines.push(`requestId: ${requestId}`);
    lines.push(`loadedPlugins: ${plugins.filter((p) => p.ok).length}/${plugins.length}`);
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("Endpoints:");
    lines.push("  GET /plugins  -> list configured and loaded plugins");
    lines.push("  GET /health   -> health check");
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("Configure:");
    lines.push(`  Env: ${ENV_KEYS.join(", ")} (comma/newline/semicolon-separated or JSON array)`);
    lines.push("  Query: ?modules=a,b,c or ?module=a");
    lines.push("");
    lines.push("Controls:");
    lines.push("  ALLOW_DYNAMIC_PLUGINS=true|false");
    lines.push("  PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST=comma-separated or patterns with * suffix");
    lines.push("  PLUGIN_BASE_URL=https://example.com/plugins/");
    return text(lines.join("\n"));
  }

  return json({
    requestId,
    message: "No plugin handled the request.",
    hint: "Use /plugins to see loaded modules. Provide modules via env or ?modules=...",
    configured: configured.source,
    loadedPlugins: plugins,
  });
});
